acceptance.assertion: Fresh Doctor derivation and task-state readback justify and then observe OPERATOR-ECOSYSTEM-REDUNDANCY-V1, REPOGROUND-AGENT-UTILITY-V1 and REPOGROUND-LEGACY-RECONCILIATION-V1 as waiting, plus SEMANTAH-INDEXD-SCALING-V1, SEMANTAH-USEFULNESS-V1 and WELTGEWEBE-FADEN-VERFALL-V1 as completion-ready; no unrelated initiative state changes.

Only RAB-V1-T002B, RAB-V1-T002, WELTGEWEBE-OS-V1-T007, WELTGEWEBE-OS-V1-T008 and WELTGEWEBE-OS-V1-T011 are removed from next/later queue lanes after fresh preimage confirmation. Their durable task states remain blocked and no ready or planned actionable task is dropped.

pr-evidence, promotion-plans, runtime-refresh and schauwerk-host-closeout-20260718.patch are individually inventoried and hash-bound. Each is either recognized by the canonical model or moved through a reversible audited transaction into an existing canonical evidence, plan or deployment area. No evidence bytes are deleted and no live reference is silently broken.

After the exact changes, Bureau Doctor reports no lifecycle mismatch, no backlog-task-not-actionable queue findings and healthy state-root hygiene for these artifacts. Database integrity remains ok and missing envelope/receipt counts remain zero.

bureau check and strict Registry truth report zero errors; the exact changed-path set is limited to the six initiative files, queue.json and any explicitly reviewed state-root classification code/tests or relocation receipt required by the fresh inventory.

Focused lifecycle, queue and state-root tests plus the complete Bureau test suite pass. The final head and diff are SHA-256-bound to a PASS self-review, GitHub CI is green, and merge/readback show the canonical immutable runtime snapshot at the merged commit.

approval.note: The user explicitly ordered implementation. Registry edits, state-root relocation, publication and merge remain bound to exact preimages, narrow leases, review evidence and authoritative post-state readback.

goal: Restore a truthful and claimable Bureau frontier from the fresh 7f291e4 runtime by reconciling the six currently proven initiative lifecycle mismatches, removing only five non-actionable blocked tasks from active queue lanes, and classifying or reversibly relocating the four known state-root hygiene artifacts without deleting evidence or weakening fail-closed health gates.

metadata.deduplication: Canonical candidate assessment returned promote with no exact duplicates or similarity suggestions. Fresh GitHub observation found no open Bureau pull requests.
does_not_establish: future health after unrelated Registry changes
metadata.scope_change_from_original_candidate: SCHAUWERK-COMPANION-HOST-HARDENING-V1 is already completed and removed from scope; WELTGEWEBE-FADEN-VERFALL-V1 is newly completion-ready; queue findings decreased from six to five.

rollback.strategy: Revert the reviewed Registry commit and restore every relocated state-root object from its audited transaction or recorded source/destination hash mapping. Do not rewrite task history, candidate history or evidence content.

title: Repair Bureau coordination truth across lifecycle, queue and state-root hygiene
